articles.title: Review and setlist: Courtney Barnett shows that being a ‘creature of habit’ isn’t always a bad thing
articles.description:
The Melbourne-based singer-songwriter brought a strong set of indie rock to Roadrunner to promote her new album “Creature of Habit.”

The post Review and setlist: Courtney Barnett shows that being a ‘creature of habit’ isn’t always a bad thing appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Courtney Barnett performed at Roadrunner on May 14, showcasing her new album 'Creature of Habit'.
The Melbourne singer-songwriter delivered a strong indie rock set, attracting a local audience.
Barnett's concert enhances Boston's vibrant music scene, supporting local venues and artists.

articles.title: MassGOP-backed lieutenant governor candidate fails to collect enough signatures to make ballot
articles.description:
“Entire batches were rejected. Towns where the campaign had supposedly gathered signatures appeared to have little or no actual activity."

The post MassGOP-backed lieutenant governor candidate fails to collect enough signatures to make ballot appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: MassGOP-backed lieutenant governor candidate failed to collect sufficient signatures for ballot access.
Campaign's signature collection faced issues, with entire batches rejected in various towns.
Local voters will not see this candidate on the ballot in the upcoming election.

articles.title: Kyle Schwarber lifts Phillies past struggling Red Sox 3-1
articles.description:
Schwarber has seven homers in his last seven games, the first Phillies player to hit at least that many in a similar span since current teammate Trea Turner in 2023.

The post Kyle Schwarber lifts Phillies past struggling Red Sox 3-1 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Phillies defeated Red Sox 3-1 at Fenway Park on May 14, 2023.
Kyle Schwarber hit his seventh homer in seven games, a franchise milestone.
Red Sox continue to struggle, raising concerns among Boston fans and analysts.

articles.title: 7 takeaways from Patriots’ 2026 schedule
articles.description:
In total, the Patriots will take on eight opponents who punched a ticket to the playoffs in 2025.

The post 7 takeaways from Patriots’ 2026 schedule appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots will face eight playoff teams from the 2025 season in 2026.
Key matchups include games against rivals like the Buffalo Bills and Miami Dolphins.
Increased competition may affect ticket sales and local fan engagement in Boston.

articles.title: Here’s your chance to design a new Boston Public Library card
articles.description:
One winner each will be selected from three different age groups to have their designs featured on new library cards.

The post Here’s your chance to design a new Boston Public Library card appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston Public Library invites residents to design new library cards.
Winners will be selected from three age groups for their designs.
This initiative encourages community engagement and creativity among Boston residents.

articles.title: ‘This was my baby’: Blaze destroys popular Belmont ice cream shop, causes floor to collapse
articles.description:
The three-alarm fire broke out early Thursday morning, causing extensive, irreparable damage to the ice cream shop.

The post ‘This was my baby’: Blaze destroys popular Belmont ice cream shop, causes floor to collapse appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A three-alarm fire destroyed a beloved ice cream shop in Belmont early Thursday morning.
The fire caused the shop's floor to collapse, resulting in extensive damage.
Local residents mourn the loss of a community favorite, impacting local business and culture.

articles.description:

articles.title: Bruins assistant GM leaving organization to ‘pursue other opportunities’
articles.description:
Langenbrunner, 50, had been involved in the Bruins organization for the past 11 years.

summary: Bruins assistant GM Jamie Langenbrunner is leaving after 11 years with the organization.
Langenbrunner, 50, will pursue other opportunities outside the Bruins.
His departure may affect team strategy and future player development in Boston.
